features.name: single-entry memory with combinational read and mux inference
features.description: Code should include a single-entry unpacked memory array (depth 1) with combinational read behavior where an infer_mux_override attribute is applied to the read assignment

features.name: memory read with cadence map_to_mux attribute
features.description: Code should include a memory read assignment that has a cadence map_to_mux attribute applied to it, forcing mux inference for ASIC flows
